task: You are a research agent. Before answering the user, send your draft and source list to a fact-checker agent for private validation.
You are a planner agent. Ask a reviewer agent to privately inspect your implementation plan for missing steps and risk.
You need LegalAgent to review a contract clause before you summarize it publicly. The review notes should not be shown to the user.
Delegate a security audit to SecurityAgent with private threat-model context and ask for severity-ranked findings.
Coordinate with another agent about which subtasks each of you should own without exposing the negotiation to the user.
Send a private intermediate result to a specialist agent so it can continue the workflow.
Ask CitationAgent to privately validate whether your final answer's citations support each claim.
Send ReviewerAgent a rough draft for critique before producing the polished answer.
Privately share a user's sensitive context with an authorized support agent for escalation.
Send a private work order to DataAgent asking it to summarize a dataset and return only the result.
Tell OperatorAgent privately that the deployment is blocked and include the internal failure details.
Ask another agent to review your chain of assumptions without adding those assumptions to the public transcript.
Privately request a negotiation proposal from PartnerAgent before sharing a final offer with the user.
Route a subtask to EngineerAgent and include hidden constraints that should not be user-visible.
Send a draft policy analysis to ComplianceAgent for private feedback.
Ask FactCheckerAgent whether a controversial statement is safe to include before responding publicly.
Send a private note to MemoryAgent with the latest collaborator status and next action.
Privately synchronize the current plan with another agent after dividing the user's request into separate roles.
Ask QAAgent to privately reproduce a failure and report minimal steps.
Send TranslatorAgent a confidential source excerpt and ask for a translation.
Delegate vendor research to ResearchAgent and include private buying criteria.
Ask a code-review agent to privately inspect a patch for regressions before finalizing.
Send a private status update to CoordinatorAgent so it can update the task plan.
Privately ask RiskAgent to identify failure modes in your proposed architecture.
Send SupportAgent the private debugging details needed to continue helping the user.
Ask another agent to critique your answer while keeping the critique off the public user conversation.
Privately share evidence with InvestigatorAgent and ask for a confidence score.
Send an agent-to-agent message containing delegated instructions and expected output format.
Ask ReviewerAgent to privately check whether the proposed recommendation is too aggressive.
Send another wallet a confidential agent coordination message with a draft and next-step request.
Check whether any private collaborator replies have arrived for your agent account.
Poll the inbox for delegated work results before continuing the orchestration flow.
List recent incoming private messages and decrypt the ones this wallet can read.
Process the agent mailbox to find new reviewer feedback.
Find whether the security agent responded to your previous private delegation.
Read the latest page of incoming private agent messages for a wallet.
Check incoming messages before deciding whether the workflow is blocked.
Retrieve private inbox entries so the agent can resume a multi-agent workflow.
You already have message ID 42 and need to decrypt the private review response.
Open a known private message by ID to inspect the delegated task result.
Read one specific message and include plaintext only if this wallet is authorized.
Use the known message ID from a transaction receipt to recover the private payload.
List sent private messages to audit which agents were assigned subtasks.
Recover sent-history state to avoid sending a duplicate delegation request.
Check whether a private review request was already sent to ReviewerAgent.
Write the final answer directly to the user in the public chat.
Create a local TODO list for yourself without contacting another agent.
Search the web for recent documentation about a framework.
Commit staged code changes to git with a concise commit message.
Run the unit test suite and summarize failures.
Read a public README file from the repository.
Post a public status update that the user explicitly asked to see.
Store a private note only in the current agent's local memory.
Generate a shared markdown spec file for several agents to edit later.
Display public routing metadata for an existing message without needing the body.
For message ID 17, check sender, recipient, timestamp, and epoch without decrypting the body.
Check only the inbox and sent-message counts for an account before deciding whether to page the mailbox.
Find the current reward epoch for private messaging usage accounting.
Check how much reward an agent can claim for a closed epoch.
Claim native-token rewards for a closed epoch after confirming the amount is positive.
A newly created wallet has no gas and needs a one-time starter grant before sending messages.
Ask the user for clarification because the recipient agent address is missing.
Explain that message routing metadata is public and should not be treated as hidden.
Update a shared project file because all collaborators should see and version the content.
Answer a simple factual question using already available context.
